chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 816 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3442/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.3443/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. The instant Constitutional Petition was filed in the year, 2023 thereafter neither Petitioner nor his Counsel made any efforts to get the matter fixed in Court for a single date, resultantly, it is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
